summary: Frontend testing for Cart UI/UX Redesign and Scope ID validation move - ALL TESTS PASSED
context_for_next_testing_agent: Cart redesign complete. Key features verified: 1) Two-column layout with Cart Items + sections on left, Order Summary on right, 2) Payment Method cards (Bank Transfer/Card Payment) with processing fee display, 3) Collapsible Promo Code section, 4) Terms & Conditions checkbox, 5) Empty cart state with 'Browse Products' button, 6) ApplicationLayout shows 'Scope-Based Pricing' notice instead of Scope ID input on product page

features_tested.details: Cart Items section on left, Order Summary sidebar on right
Shows product name, tagline, price, quantity, Remove button
Bank Transfer (No processing fee) and Card Payment (5% fee) options with visual selection
Selecting Card Payment shows fee breakdown: $2499.00 + $124.95 (5%) = $2623.95
Shows Subtotal, Processing fee (when card selected), and Total
Collapsible section with input field and Apply button
Checkbox with link to terms visible

features_tested.feature: Create Order / Proceed to Checkout button
features_tested.details: Button text changes based on payment method selection
Shows shopping cart icon, 'Your cart is empty' message, and 'Browse Products' button
Product page shows 'Scope-Based Pricing' notice with message to enter Scope ID during checkout

features_tested.feature: Scope ID input removed from product page
features_tested.details: No Scope ID input on ApplicationLayout product page - moved to cart
